creator: eilander@paranoid.nl
text:
I enabled IPMI on a supermicro server
(see http://paranoid.nl/~eilander/freebsd/ipmi/ipmicons.html)

I can get the dmesg output on boot, but when I should get a login (serial
port), it won't come up. When I boot without ACPI enabled the serial login
comes up fine.

reproduces on 2 other boxes.
